Please select start and end dates: Please select start and end dates
access_denied_desc: You do not have permission to view this page. Contact your administrator.
access_token_placeholder: Leave blank if no SYNC_TOKEN was set
adjust_stock_note: Use Inventory → Adjust Stock to change per-branch quantities.
affected_users_logout_warning: Affected users must log out and back in for changes to take effect.
affected_users_warning: Affected users must log out and back in for changes to take effect.
all_custom_tables: All custom tables and their data
all_settings: All app settings (business name, currency, etc.)
all_users_except_primary: All users EXCEPT the primary admin account
audit_log_desc: Default columns: Record · Device · User · Action — click a row to see all details including data changes.
awaiting_payment_title: Awaiting Payment — not yet counted as revenue
backup_warning: This will replace ALL current data. Cannot be undone.
branch_delete_has_stock: Cannot delete — transfer all stock out first
branches_load_slow: Branches are taking longer than expected. Tap Retry or revisit in a moment.
choose_branch: Choose which branch this item comes from
click_row_details: Click row → full details + data changes
cloudflare_url_hint: Paste the URL printed in the terminal by start-server. Must start with https://
configure_payment_desc: Configure payment methods shown in POS checkout
configure_security_desc: Configure session duration and security settings
confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this?
confirm_delete_branch: Delete branch? This cannot be undone.
confirm_delete_branches_count: Delete selected branches? This cannot be undone.
add_stock_desc: This will add the same quantity to each selected product.
transfer_same_branch_error: Source and destination cannot be the same
no_data_add_row: No data yet. Add a row!
please_select_start_end_dates: Please select start and end dates
click_add_column: Click "Add Column" to define your table structure
csv_template_columns: name*, sku, barcode, category, brand, unit, description, selling_price_usd, selling_price_khr, special_price_usd, special_price_khr, purchase_price_usd, purchase_price_khr, stock_quantity, low_stock_threshold, supplier, branch, parent_id, is_group, image_filename_1..5, image_filenames, image_conflict_mode
customize_fonts: Customize fonts, sizes, colors and layout style
data_reset_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete all data?
default_branch_desc: New sales and stock adjustments default to this branch
delivery_fee_position_after_desc: Delivery fee shown after the totals section
delivery_fee_position_totals_desc: Delivery fee shown inside the totals section
delivery_position_after_desc: Appears right after the items, before totals
edit_return_warning: Editing a return will recalculate stock and refund amounts.
everything_listed: ALL sales, products, customers, suppliers, inventory
contacts_partial_export: Some contact records could not be exported completely.
export_backup_desc: Downloads a .json file containing all products, sales, returns, customers, suppliers, stock, settings, and custom tables.
export_desc: Exports database, product images, and a JSON snapshot to a folder.
factory_item1: All sales, products, stock, inventory movements
factory_reset_complete: Factory reset complete. Please set up the app from scratch.
factory_reset_desc: Wipes everything including users, roles, settings, and branches. The database is fully reset to its initial empty state.
factory_reset_warning: ⛔ EXTREME CAUTION: This deletes absolutely everything. There is NO undo.
img_rule_1: Filename must match product name exactly (e.g. Coffee Latte.jpg)
img_rule_3: Existing product images will be replaced
import_all_select_type: Select the contact type to import:
import_backup_desc: Restores data from a previously exported .json backup file. Current data (products, sales, returns, contacts, stock, settings) will be replaced.
import_backup_warning: This will replace existing data. Export a fresh backup first if you want to keep your current data.
import_step_desc: Download the template, fill in your data, then upload.
insufficient_amount: Amount paid is less than total
keep_terminal_open: Keep the terminal open — closing it stops the sync server.
manual_return_hint: Manual return — not linked to a sale.
name: Name
net_revenue_desc: Net revenue = gross sales minus returns/refunds in selected period.
new_product_branch_help: New products should start in a branch so opening stock and later inventory movements stay tied to the right location.
new_product_branch_note: New products should start in a branch so opening stock and later inventory movements stay tied to the right location.
no_branch_stock: No stock in this branch. Use Transfer or Adjust Stock to add items.
no_customers: No customers yet. Add or import customers above.
no_named_customers: No named customers in this period
no_returns_found: No returns found. Click "+ New Return" to process one.
no_suppliers: No suppliers yet. Add or import suppliers above.
not_assigned_branch: Not assigned to a specific branch
offline_first_desc: If the sync server is unreachable, the app falls back to local database automatically. Data syncs again when the server comes back online.
opening_stock_note: Opening stock quantity will be recorded under this branch.
otp_enter_code: Enter the code from your authenticator app to confirm setup
print_auto_save_note: 🖨️ Settings saved automatically and applied every time you print from POS or Sales.
print_test_desc: Send a sample receipt to verify settings.
products_load_slow: Products are taking longer than expected. Tap Retry or revisit the page in a moment.
products_partial_load: Some product details are still loading. The main list is ready.
products_refresh_failed: Unable to refresh products right now. Showing the latest loaded data.
receipt_language_desc: Controls the language used for receipt labels and field names
reset_all_deleted: All sales, returns, products, stock, customers, suppliers, delivery contacts, inventory movements
reset_all_desc: Deletes everything: sales, returns, products, customers, suppliers, stock movements. Settings, users, and branches are kept.
reset_all_kept: Users, roles, branches, categories, units, settings
reset_business_desc: Permanently deletes all sales, products, inventory, customers, and suppliers. Users, roles, branches, and settings are kept.
reset_sales_deleted: All sales, all returns, all inventory movements, all stock quantities (zeroed)
reset_sales_desc: Deletes all sales and returns history and zeros all stock quantities. Products, customers, and suppliers are kept.
reset_sales_kept: Products, customers, suppliers, settings, users, branches
return_items_required: Select at least one item to return.
return_search_hint: Enter a receipt number or sale ID. You can also skip and do a manual return.
revenue_net_returns: Revenue is net of returns for the selected period.
rfd_business_name: Company name at top of receipt
rfd_delivery_show_contact: Recipient name and phone on receipt
rfd_show_discount: Show when a discount was applied
rfd_show_emojis: Show emoji icons in receipts (📞 🚚 🏷️ etc)
role_saved_relogin: Role saved — affected users must log out and back in
rs_auto_save_hint: Toggle any field on/off. All changes auto-save and apply instantly to the live preview and to receipts printed from POS & Sales.
sales_load_slow: Sales are taking longer than expected. Tap Refresh or revisit the page in a moment.
search_and_tip: AND mode — all terms must match
search_comma_tip: Comma separates OR-groups · space = AND within a group
search_example_finds: Example: coffee,latte finds products containing coffee OR latte
search_instructions: Comma separates OR-groups · space = AND within a group
search_receipt_hint: Enter receipt # or sale ID to find the original sale
search_receipt_or_id: Search by receipt number or sale ID
search_returns_placeholder: 🔍 Search by return #, receipt, customer, reason…
session_duration_hint: Applied as default on login screen (can be overridden per login)
show_emojis_receipt_desc: Toggle emoji icons in receipt (📞 🚚 🏷️ etc.)
stock_desc_out: 🔴 Shows Out of Stock when stock ≤ 0
sync_auto_connected_desc: This device is automatically connected to the sync server on your network.
sync_description: Your laptop runs the sync server. Cloudflare Tunnel makes it reachable from any network or device.
sync_local_only_desc: Running in local-only mode. Changes are not synced to other devices.
sync_manual_url_hint: Paste the URL printed in the terminal by start-server. Must start with https://
sync_server_desc: One device runs the server. All devices open the Tailscale URL in browser — no manual setup needed.
sync_setup_title: Setup (run once on the main laptop)
sync_step1_desc: Double-click start-server.bat (Windows) or run bash start-server.sh (Mac/Linux)
sync_step2_desc: Wait ~10 seconds. A public Cloudflare URL appears in the terminal.
sync_step3_desc: Copy that URL and paste it below on every device that needs to sync.
sync_step4_desc: Keep the terminal open — closing it stops the sync server.
sync_step_1: Double-click start-server.bat (Windows) or run bash start-server.sh (Mac/Linux)
sync_step_2: Wait ~10 seconds. A public URL appears
sync_step_3: Copy that URL and paste it below on every device that needs to sync
sync_time_note1: All timestamps are stored in UTC on the server.
sync_time_note2: Display timezone converts UTC to your local time.
sync_time_note3: Drift shows the difference between server and client clocks.
sync_time_note4: Small drift (< 1 min) is normal and does not affect data.
sync_token_hint: Leave blank if no SYNC_TOKEN was set
tap_product_to_add: Tap a product to add it to cart
tap_row_to_view_edit: Tap a row to view or edit
tap_to_view_edit: Tap a row to view details or edit
timezone_desc: Used for displaying sale times, dashboard hours, and audit logs in your local time.
timezone_display_note: Time is always accurate — only the display label changes
two_factor_desc: Protect your admin account with an authenticator app
users_kept: Users, roles, branches, and settings will NOT be deleted.
view_only_message: 👁 View only — contact an administrator to make changes.
what_customers_pay: What customers pay at point of sale
what_customers_pay_pos: What customers pay at point of sale
what_you_pay_supplier: What you pay the supplier when buying stock
receipt_order_drag_hint: 🖐️ Drag rows to reorder receipt sections. Use ↑↓ arrows or drag. Insert divider lines anywhere to visually separate sections on the receipt.
pos_status_choose_desc: Choose how this sale is being processed. This will appear in Sales history.
pos_status_awaiting_payment_desc: Order placed, payment pending — stock held
pos_status_awaiting_delivery_desc: Paid, not yet delivered — stock deducted
inventory_and_or_tip: Comma separates terms. Use AND mode for all terms or OR mode for any term.
sale_membership_attach_hint: Use this when a sale was created anonymously and staff need to link it to a member later.
branch_default_hint: New sales and stock adjustments default to this branch.
invalid_transfer_quantity: Transfer quantity must be greater than zero
returns_scope_hint: Customer refunds and supplier returns are tracked separately.
supplier_return_hint: Send stock back to supplier and record compensation/loss.
supplier_return_stock_hint: Only products with stock in the selected branch are shown. Returned quantity cannot exceed available stock.
supplier_return_summary_hint: Loss = total cost - supplier compensation. This affects inventory valuation and return accounting.
supplier_return_edit_not_supported: Supplier returns cannot be edited from this form yet.
search_products_placeholder: Search products by name, SKU, category
tap_to_view_details: Tap a record to view details.
folder_picker_fallback: Native folder picker is unavailable in this runtime. Use Choose Path (manual) below.
sync_auto_detected_note: Your server was auto-detected from the page URL. Only change these settings if you need to connect to a different server.
tap_any_stat_for_details: Tap any stat card for details.
password_required_new_user: Password is required for new users
users_page_desc: Manage staff accounts, roles, and login security from one place.
users_view_only_note: View-only mode for shared users. Account details and OTP can still be managed from your profile button.
avatar_upload_note: Use My Profile to upload an image
current_password_required_save: Current password is required to save account changes
profile_updated_email_reverify: Profile updated. Your new email replaced the previous one and now needs verification.
new_password_min_length: Use at least 4 characters for the new password
new_password_confirm_mismatch: New password confirmation does not match
current_password_required_change: Current password is required to change password
login_duration_saved: Login duration preference saved. It will be used on the next login.
email_provider_setup_needed: Email code sending is not configured yet. Ask admin to configure an email sender provider.
profile_email_note: Used for email login, password reset, and direct account notices. Google can still be linked independently.
email_login_simple_note: No separate email verification step is required here. Save your email once, then use OTP, Google, or your password for account access and recovery flows.
verification_email_sent_to: Verification email sent to {destination}. Open it and click the confirmation link, then refresh status here.
verification_status_refreshed: Verification status refreshed. If you just clicked the email link, wait a moment and try again.
phone_verification_disabled_note: Optional contact field. Phone verification is available after a phone-auth provider is configured.
profile_security_desc: Manage password, OTP login protection, and your default login duration.
admin_password_override_note: Current password can be left blank when an administrator updates another non-admin account.
admin_profile_override_hint: Admins can overwrite account fields directly and still send verification codes when needed.
self_service_profile_hint: Self-service changes require your current password. You can verify your email or phone with one-time checks.
cannot_manage_admin_account: You cannot modify another admin account.
system_role_edit_locked: System roles cannot be edited here.
enter_username_email_first: Enter your username or email first.
verification_provider_missing: No email code sender is configured yet. Please ask admin to configure email sending for verification codes.
verification_code_sent_if_exists: If the account exists, a verification code has been sent.
password_min_4: Use at least 4 characters for the new password.
password_reset_done: Password reset complete. You can now sign in with the new password.
shared_device_security_note: On shared devices, choose "Until I close the browser" for better security.
use_verified_email_notice: Use a verified email address to receive a one-time verification code.
upload_no_image_path: Upload did not return an image path
customerPortalDesc: Portal layout, business info, public path, images, and customer-facing content are edited inside the Customer Portal page with live preview. Point rules are managed in Loyalty Points.
navigationHint: Choose the sidebar order and which 4 items stay pinned in the mobile bottom bar.
sidebarTextColorHint: Overrides page names, section text, and icons on the sidebar/mobile nav
files_page_hint: Browse uploaded assets, reuse them across the app, and safely delete unused files.
library_page_hint: Manage uploaded assets, AI providers, and saved AI research from one place.
file_in_use: This file is still in use and cannot be deleted.
fo_desc_divider: Visual separator line on the receipt
receipt_pdf_layout_note: PDF export uses this exact receipt layout.
receipt_pdf_preview_fallback: PDF export was unavailable, so a printable receipt preview was opened instead.
print_test_desc_pdf: Generate a sample PDF to verify sizing, margins, and readability.
secure_signin_workspace: Secure sign-in for your business workspace
auth_welcome_body: Sign in to manage sales, stock, customer accounts, and daily operations from one secure workspace.
auth_feature_fast_desc: Compact tools for sales, stock, and customer work every day.
auth_feature_secure_desc: Protected sign-in methods, session control, and account recovery.
auth_feature_synced_desc: Your workspace stays connected to the live server and current data.
auth_feature_trusted_desc: Made for teams sharing branches, devices, and daily business tasks.
organization_hidden_hint: Organization details stay hidden until you expand this section.
organization_join_locked: Organization creation is currently disabled. This server is prepared for LeangCosmetics and future organization-ready expansion.
organization_join_hint: Search the organization name and select it before signing in.
oauth_matching_email_hint: Social sign-in works after admin creates your local account and the provider email matches your account email.
oauth_local_account_hint: An admin still needs to create your local Business OS account first. Once linked, Google keeps working on later sign-ins.
code_signin_notice: Sign in securely using a one-time code sent to your verified email.
enter_authenticator_code: Enter the 6-digit code shown in your app.
oauth_start_failed: Unable to start sign-in with provider.
sign_in_methods_desc: Keep your local admin-created account and add email or Google sign-in methods whenever you want them.
add_email_before_connecting: Add your account email before connecting a sign-in provider.
email_login_ready_note: Email sign-in is ready. Verified email also helps recovery and change tracking.
verify_email_first_note: Email sign-in works with your saved email. Verify it to make recovery and email changes more reliable.
email_sender_vs_auth_note: Supabase handles sign-in methods. Verification and reset codes still need a separate mail sender such as Resend, SendGrid, or an email webhook.
email_sender_only_note: Email verification and reset codes need a configured mail sender.
add_email_for_login_note: Add your account email first to use email sign-in on the login screen.
email_login_ready_note_simple: Email sign-in is ready once this email is saved on your account.
google_login_ready_note: Connect Google once here, then you can keep signing in with that Google account.
google_email_required_note: Save an email on this profile first. Google sign-in matches accounts by email.
google_provider_disabled_note: Google sign-in is not enabled in Supabase yet.
facebook_login_ready_note: Connect Facebook once here, then you can keep signing in with that Facebook account.
facebook_email_required_note: Save an email on this profile first. Facebook sign-in matches accounts by email.
facebook_provider_disabled_note: Facebook sign-in is not enabled in Supabase yet.
disconnect_google_password_hint: Disconnecting Google uses the current password from the Security section below.
provider_email_match_note: Google stays linked to this local account once connected here. Disabled or deleted local users still cannot access the app.
provider_change_note: To switch to another Google account, disconnect the current one first and then connect the new provider.
profile_updated_email_changed: Profile updated. The new email is now attached to this account.
current_password_required_disconnect: Current password is required to disconnect a sign-in provider.
email_sender_setup_needed: Email code sending is not configured yet. Ask admin to configure an email sender provider.
email_sender_missing: No email code sender is configured yet. Please ask admin to configure email sending for verification codes.
supabase_verification_email_note: Supabase sends the confirmation email through your configured SMTP. Open the email, confirm the address, then refresh status here.
enter_otp_first: Enter the OTP code from your authenticator app.
otp_reset_failed: Failed to reset password with OTP.
otp_password_reset_done: Password reset complete. You can now sign in with the new password.
otp_reset_notice: Use the OTP code from your authenticator app to set a new password. If OTP is not enabled on your account, use Google sign-in, email recovery, or ask an admin to reset the password.
email_reset_notice: Enter your username, name, email, or phone. If this account has a saved email, Business OS will send a password reset link there.
email_reset_sent: If this account can receive recovery email, reset instructions have been sent.
email_reset_failed: Failed to send password reset email.
set_new_password_from_email: Set your new password below to finish email recovery.
recovery_link_missing: Recovery link is missing or expired. Please request a new email reset link.
password_min_6: Use at least 6 characters for the new password.
email_reset_complete_failed: Failed to update password from recovery email.
email_reset_complete_done: Password reset complete. You can now log in with your email and new password.
server_folder_note: Folder actions use paths on the Business OS server device. When you are connected remotely, choose or paste a path that exists on that server machine.
server_restore_note: Restore uses a folder from the Business OS server device. Remote browsers cannot browse their own local disk into the server runtime.
host_ui_local_only: This action only works on the server machine. Type or paste a server path manually when connected remotely.
open_folder_local_only: Opening the folder is only available on the server machine.
host_ui_remote_note: Remote sessions cannot open the server machine folder dialog or Explorer window. Use Browse folders below or type a server path manually.

common.scan_ready: Point the camera at a barcode or SKU label.
common.scan_unsupported: Camera scanning is not supported in this browser. You can still paste or type the value below.
common.scan_permission_denied: Camera access was denied. Allow camera access or enter the code manually.
common.camera_permission_needed: We need camera access to scan barcodes. Tap below and allow camera permission when your browser asks.
common.camera_permission_blocked: Camera access is blocked in this browser. Allow it in browser settings, then try again or enter the code manually.
common.scan_failed: Unable to start camera scanning right now.
common.export_sales_hint: Export the current filtered sales results as CSV.
common.ai_providers_hint: Configure AI providers, default models, and request limits here.
common.ai_responses_hint: Saved AI responses and research history appear here.
common.api_key_hint: Stored on this Business OS server only and never exposed to portal visitors.
common.priority_hint: Higher priority providers are preferred when auto mode is selected.
common.current_password_sensitive_note: For sensitive account changes, confirm with your current password.
common.phone_contact_only_hint: Phone is stored as a contact detail only unless phone authentication is configured.
common.profile_partial_load: Some profile details could not be loaded yet.
common.supabase_auth_not_ready: Supabase Auth is not ready yet.
common.users_partial_load_failed: Some user data could not be loaded.
common.roles_partial_load_failed: Some role data could not be loaded.
common.data_folder_change_prompt: Change the Business OS data folder?
common.data_folder_copy_safe: Existing data will stay safe. Move or copy files only after the new path is confirmed.
common.data_folder_desc: Choose where Business OS stores the database, uploads, and backups on this server device.
common.data_folder_load_failed: Failed to load the current data folder.
common.data_folder_path_required: A data folder path is required.
common.data_folder_reset_done: Data folder reset to the default location.
common.data_folder_reset_prompt: Reset the data folder back to the default location?
common.data_folder_safe_copy: Keep a safe copy of the old folder before deleting anything manually.
common.drive_sync_desc: Mirror backups to Google Drive on a schedule from this server device.
common.drive_sync_setup_note: Use a Google Cloud OAuth client that matches this server URL.
common.folder_backup_placeholder: Choose a folder for exported backup files
common.folder_restore_note: Restore uses a backup folder or JSON file from this Business OS server device.
common.folder_restore_placeholder: Choose a backup folder or JSON file path
common.import_backup_confirm: Import this backup and replace current data?
common.organization_runtime_alignment_desc_ok: Runtime organization matches the current Business OS workspace.
common.organization_runtime_alignment_desc_warn: The current runtime organization does not match the expected workspace.
common.policyHint: These rules affect POS membership discounts, customer portal balances, and point deductions after refunds.
common.infoTextHint: Shown inside the customer portal and membership lookup.
common.wholeUnitsOnly: Points are redeemed in whole units only.
common.validationRedeem: Enter the points needed to redeem one unit.
common.customerHint: Look up a membership number to review balances and totals.
common.pointsLeaderboardHint: Customers with the highest point balances appear here.
common.behavior1: Points are earned only from completed sales.
common.behavior2: Refunded items reverse the earned points tied to that sale.
common.behavior3: Reward points can be granted manually after share submissions are reviewed.
common.behavior4: Customers can view balances publicly, but staff apply redemptions during checkout.
common.attachHint: Attach this policy to the customer portal and POS behavior.
common.invalidPublicPath: Please use a clean public path such as /portal or /customers.
common.portalVisibilityRequired: Enable at least one section customers can see before publishing.

auditLog.audit_log_desc: Default columns: Record, Device, User, Action. Click a row to see full details and data changes.
auditLog.search_audit_placeholder: Search by user, action, entity, device, or summary...

profile.organization_privacy_hint: Organization identifiers stay hidden here. Only the organization name and role context are shown.
profile.avatar_editor_hint: Use the sliders to zoom and position the image before saving.
profile.sign_out_profile_hint: Use this to end your session from the current device when you are done.

portalEditor.studioHint: Edit the customer-facing portal here. The public page remains read-only.
portalEditor.addressLinkHint: Optional external map or directions link opened when customers tap the address.
portalEditor.syncSpeedHint: Lower values refresh faster but create more requests. Internal preview still reacts to sync events immediately.
portalEditor.aboutContentHint: Tell customers about your story, hours, policies, or services.
portalEditor.aboutBlocksHint: Mix text, images, and video blocks to tell the business story.
portalEditor.aboutEmpty: Add your first block to describe the business, products, or services customers should know about.
portalEditor.faqHint: Add your most common customer questions here. Customers can open each answer one by one.
portalEditor.portalAssistantHint: This floating helper suggests products from your live catalog and can include online references when the selected provider supports them.
portalEditor.assistantPromptHint: Optional store-specific rules, such as tone or what categories to prioritize.
portalEditor.customerUrlHint: Set a custom public path here, then publish that path through a separate customer-facing Funnel so the customer link is harder to guess from the admin side.
portalEditor.publicUrlHint: Use a different public domain or Funnel URL here when you publish the customer portal outside the admin link.
portalEditor.stockThresholdHint: Global thresholds override the product-level stock badges on the customer portal only.
portalEditor.pointsPageHint: Point earning rules, redemption values, customer point notes, and reward-point defaults are managed in Loyalty Points so this portal page can stay focused on customer-facing content.
portalEditor.submissionInstructionsHint: Customers can only submit screenshots. Staff reviews and awards points inside Business OS.
portalEditor.reviewQueueHint: Approve, reject, and award points for customer share submissions.
portalEditor.portalImageUploadHint: Upload stores a short file path, so portal settings stay clean.
portalEditor.faviconHint: Shown in browser tabs and device shortcuts.
portalEditor.mapEmbedHint: Paste a Google Maps link or embed URL. The portal will render it as an interactive map card.
portalEditor.searchPlaceholder: Search by product name, description, category, or brand
portalEditor.noProducts: No products matched the current filters.
portalEditor.membershipLookupHint: Customers can view purchases, returns, and points. Only staff can apply membership discounts during checkout.
portalEditor.redeemRule: Points can be used in whole units only. Ask staff to apply them during checkout.
portalEditor.redeemSummary: Minimum {points} points per unit. Available now: {units} unit(s).
portalEditor.noSales: No sales found for this membership yet.
portalEditor.noReturns: No returns found for this membership yet.
portalEditor.shareProofsHint: Customers can submit screenshots showing they shared the business. Staff reviews and awards points inside Business OS.
portalEditor.sharePlatformPlaceholder: Facebook post, Instagram story, Telegram status...
portalEditor.shareNotePlaceholder: Optional note for the business team
portalEditor.sharePaste: Paste screenshots here or upload below
portalEditor.shareRequirement: Add at least one screenshot before submitting.
portalEditor.translateWidgetHint: Public customers can switch languages with Google Translate. Internal Business OS translation stays separate.
portalEditor.staffAppliedOnly: Points are reviewed and applied by staff only. Customers cannot redeem them directly here.
portalEditor.externalPreviewNotice: The embedded preview uses the public customer URL you configured below.
portalEditor.filterCompactHint: Use quick filters to narrow products faster.
portalEditor.portalAboutFallback: Add your business story in the editor so customers can quickly learn about your brand.
portalEditor.assistantQuestion: What would you like help finding?
portalEditor.assistantQuestionPlaceholder: Example: I have oily acne-prone skin and want a gentle daily sunscreen.
portalEditor.assistantUsageCompact: {users} user(s) are using this right now. Each visitor can send {searches} search(es) per minute.
portalEditor.assistantNoProvider: Choose and test an AI provider in Library before enabling the portal assistant.
portalEditor.assistantNoAnswer: No AI answer yet. Ask a question to generate suggestions.
portalEditor.assistantContactNote: For more accurate inquiries, please contact our store on Instagram or Facebook.

backup.backup_warning: This will replace ALL current data. Cannot be undone.

variant_helper_text: Variants of the same product group can have different prices, barcodes, and suppliers.
variant_name_placeholder: e.g. Product A - Blue, 500ml, Size L
csv_paste_placeholder: Paste CSV here if you do not want to pick a file.
inventory_import_help: Import stock adjustments from CSV rows. Supported actions are add, remove, and set.
inventory_import_choose_rows: Choose a CSV file with at least one inventory row.
inventory_import_row_quantity_invalid: Row {row}: quantity must be greater than 0
sales_import_help: Import sales from CSV rows grouped by receipt number. Each row should describe one sold product line.
sales_import_choose_rows: Choose a CSV file with at least one sale row.
sales_import_row_quantity_invalid: Row {row}: quantity must be greater than 0
sales_import_row_branch_required: Row {row}: branch is required when multiple branches are active
sales_import_finished: Sales import finished: {imported} imported, {duplicates} duplicates skipped.
scan_fallback_active: Using compatibility scan mode for this browser.
otp_login_hint: Open your authenticator app and enter the current 6-digit OTP code.
camera_permission_needed: We need camera access to scan barcodes. Tap below and allow camera permission when your browser asks.
camera_permission_reset_hint: Open the camera permission from the lock icon in your browser address bar, switch it back to Allow, then try again.
settings_write_conflict: Settings changed on another device. Latest values have been reloaded.
search_users_placeholder: Search users, phone, email, or role
users_load_slow: Users are taking longer than expected. Tap Refresh or revisit the page in a moment.
users_refresh_failed: Unable to refresh users right now. Showing the latest loaded data.
